raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"To better understand the help needed for this section, please choose the primary focus: (1) polishing writing, grammar, and flow; (2) reviewing logic, consistency, and novelty; (3) checking evidence alignment, results, and citations; or (4) reorganizing structure and narrative arc.","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with a research section must ensure transparent reporting of limitations and uncertainties to maintain scientific integrity.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of results or contributions in the provided section.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any suggested changes within the bounds of the described method and evaluation.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate potential misuse of anomaly detection techniques in sensitive applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to ensure all references and methods in the section are accurately attributed and verifiable."}}

parsed.clarification_question: To better understand the help needed for this section, please choose the primary focus: (1) polishing writing, grammar, and flow; (2) reviewing logic, consistency, and novelty; (3) checking evidence alignment, results, and citations; or (4) reorganizing structure and narrative arc.

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with a research section must ensure transparent reporting of limitations and uncertainties to maintain scientific integrity.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of results or contributions in the provided section.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any suggested changes within the bounds of the described method and evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate potential misuse of anomaly detection techniques in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to ensure all references and methods in the section are accurately attributed and verifiable.
